name: monster7-member-api

scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env production --remote
scripts.seed:local: mkdir -p .wrangler/tmp && set -a; [ -f ./.dev.vars ] && . ./.dev.vars; set +a; tsx seed/seed.ts > .wrangler/tmp/admin-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file .wrangler/tmp/admin-seed.sql
scripts.seed:staging: mkdir -p .wrangler/tmp && tsx seed/seed.ts > .wrangler/tmp/admin-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file .wrangler/tmp/admin-seed.sql
scripts.seed:production: mkdir -p .wrangler/tmp && tsx seed/seed.ts > .wrangler/tmp/admin-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --env production --remote --file .wrangler/tmp/admin-seed.sql

description: Cloudflare Worker API for the Monster7 member system.
